response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) work, aligning partially with the GenAI/cloud focus. However, his direct experience with production-grade AI solutions, RAG architectures, and vector databases is less explicitly documented, though his technical breadth and leadership suggest adaptability.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and infrastructure experience (8+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS).
Proven leadership in technical roles, including mentoring, tooling development, and cross-functional collaboration.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, indicating familiarity with emerging GenAI tooling.
concerns: Lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions or RAG architectures in the resume.
Experience with vector databases and LLM optimization is not clearly highlighted.
While customer-facing, his stakeholder engagement (e.g., technical discovery sessions) is not detailed.
